name: Dietz Land Surveying
description: Surveying services for Baltimore City, Baltimore County, Anne Arundel, Carroll, Howard, and Harford Counties; member of Maryland Society of Surveyors.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Dietz clearly performed the better survey for these reasons: They performed more research, found the missing marker
They followed the intent of the deed - Judge Lawrence Daniels, Baltimore County Circuit Court

sentiment.summary: Dietz Land Surveying has an exceptionally positive reputation, validated by a court judgment praising their thorough research, attention to detail, and superior survey quality.
